summary: Story 4.4 complete: Coverage for target modules >=80%, zero npm audit vulnerabilities, performance optimized (status <2s, next <3s), README with all commands, CHANGELOG 0.4.6→1.0.0, release package verified. npm publish NOT executed — requires human decision.
